description:
A safety engineer is planning a confined space entry into a sump pit and needs to assess vapor accumulation risks. Produce a safety report at '~/Documents/confined_space_vapor_report.txt' for Hydrogen Sulfide, Ammonia, Chlorine, Carbon Monoxide, and Sulfur Dioxide using 'Vapor Density' (relative to air) data from CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/).

The report must follow this format:

CONFINED SPACE VAPOR DENSITY ASSESSMENT
========================================

Chemical: [Name]
Vapor Density: [Value from CAMEO]
Classification: [HEAVIER/LIGHTER/SIMILAR]

(Repeat for all 5 chemicals)

SUMMARY
========================================
Chemicals that accumulate in LOW areas: [list
